channel.title: Install on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Install on Margrop Blog

item.title: WeChat Old Version Installation Method - Version Too Low, Please Upgrade to the Latest Version
item.description:
First install the latest version of WeChat and log in.

Uninstall the app using the cmd command while preserving user data:

adb shell pm uninstall -k com.tencent.mm

Restart your phone

adb root
  • This step is very important, otherwise you will get an error message adb: failed to install xxxxxx Failure [INSTALL_FAILED_VERSION_DOWNGRADE]

Install the old version APK using the cmd command (followed by the installation package path):

adb install -r -d

Log into your WeChat account on the old version.

item.title: How to Install Jike AC Virtual Machine in Proxmox VE Environment?
item.description:
According to 恩山的集客AC AP扫盲贴:

Q: Can I skip AC and have two AP connect directly to the main router for roaming? A: Yes, but roaming works better with AC than without it. With ac present, roaming performance won’t disappoint. Jike’s roaming is not a simple weak-signal kick. With ac in place, excellent roaming effects are achieved regardless of whether Jike ap supports kvr, because ac+ap is proactive roaming, which does not rely on kvr protocol and has very low requirements on clients. Micro ac only handles configuration distribution and cannot perform proactive roaming; roaming effectiveness depends on the client.

item.title: Upgrading or Fresh Installing MariaDB 10.5 on CentOS 7 Using Aliyun Mirror
item.description:
Update the System First

yum update -y

Edit the yum Configuration File Using Aliyun Mirror

  • Here MariaDB 10.5 is used as an example
vim /etc/yum.repos.d/MariaDB10.repo

#http://downloads.mariadb.org/mariadb/repositories/
[mariadb]
name = MariaDB
baseurl = https://mirrors.aliyun.com/mariadb/yum/10.5/centos7-amd64
gpgkey = https://mirrors.aliyun.com/mariadb/yum/RPM-GPG-KEY-MariaDB
gpgcheck = 1

item.title: Installing Docker on CentOS 7 and Configuring Aliyun Mirror Source
item.description:
Docker Version

Since Docker version 1.13, Docker has adopted a timeline-based versioning approach, dividing releases into Community Edition (CE) and Enterprise Edition (EE). Docker CE is the free community edition, while Docker EE is the paid enterprise version.

item.title: Installing Frp Client on CentOS with SSH Access
item.description:
Download and Extract Frp

  • Latest Frp download address: https://github.com/fatedier/frp/releases/
mkdir ~/frp
cd ~/frp
wget https://github.com/fatedier/frp/releases/download/v0.35.0/frp_0.35.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar -xvzf frp_0.35.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz

item.title: Initialization script after Proxmox VE installation
item.description: In order to facilitate the installation of PVE, I compiled the relevant commands myself. Please modify them according to your own environment.
